meta.title: Malaysia Property Network | Property Management for Overseas Owners
meta.description: Professional property management and rental solutions in Johor Bahru, Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, and Danga Bay for overseas property owners.
meta.keywords: Malaysia property management, Johor Bahru rental, Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, overseas property owners

home.heroDescription: We manage, rent, and protect your Malaysian property while you live abroad. Trusted local expertise in Johor Bahru's premier developments.
home.servicesSubtitle: End-to-end property management tailored for overseas owners
home.service1Desc: Screening, leasing, rent collection, and tenant communication handled locally on your behalf.
home.service2Desc: Regular inspections, repairs, and upkeep to preserve your asset value.
home.service3Desc: Market-rate pricing, listing management, and vacancy minimization strategies.
home.service4Desc: Transparent monthly reports with income, expenses, and property condition updates.
home.locationsSubtitle: Specialized knowledge in Johor Bahru's key property markets
home.why1: Local team with on-ground presence in Johor Bahru
home.why2: Bilingual support in English and Chinese
home.why3: Transparent reporting and secure payment handling
home.why4: Deep expertise in Forest City, R&F, and Danga Bay
home.ctaDescription: Get a free property assessment and rental strategy consultation.

propertyManagement.title: Property Management Services
propertyManagement.subtitle: Full-service management for overseas property owners
propertyManagement.intro: Owning property in Malaysia from abroad requires a reliable local partner. Malaysia Property Network provides comprehensive management so your investment performs while you focus on life overseas.
propertyManagement.step1Desc: We evaluate your unit, market conditions, and rental potential.
propertyManagement.step2Desc: Professional marketing, screening, and lease execution.
propertyManagement.step3Desc: Rent collection, maintenance, inspections, and owner reporting.
propertyManagement.step4Desc: Quarterly reviews to optimize rental yield and asset value.

johorBahru.title: Johor Bahru Property Management
johorBahru.subtitle: Gateway to Singapore — Malaysia's fastest-growing property market
johorBahru.intro: Johor Bahru offers strong rental demand driven by cross-border workers, expatriates, and students. We help overseas owners maximize returns in condos, serviced apartments, and landed properties across the city.

forestCity.title: Forest City Property Management
forestCity.subtitle: Integrated resort city on the southern coast of Johor
forestCity.intro: Forest City presents unique opportunities and challenges for overseas investors. Our team understands the development's regulations, tenant demographics, and rental dynamics to keep your unit occupied and well-maintained.

rfPrincessCove.title: R&F Princess Cove Management
rfPrincessCove.subtitle: Premium waterfront living near the Causeway
rfPrincessCove.intro: R&F Princess Cove is one of Johor Bahru's most sought-after addresses. We manage units for overseas owners with expertise in this development's facilities, strata rules, and competitive rental market.

dangaBay.title: Danga Bay Property Management
dangaBay.subtitle: Established waterfront district with proven rental history
dangaBay.intro: Danga Bay's mature ecosystem of condos, hotels, and commercial spaces creates steady rental demand. We help overseas owners navigate management companies, maintenance fees, and tenant expectations in this established area.

about.title: About Malaysia Property Network
about.subtitle: Your trusted local partner for Malaysian property
about.mission: To give overseas property owners peace of mind through professional, transparent, and responsive property management in Johor Bahru and surrounding developments.
about.story: Malaysia Property Network was founded to bridge the gap between overseas investors and the local Malaysian property market. Our bilingual team combines real estate expertise with hands-on management experience in Forest City, R&F Princess Cove, Danga Bay, and across Johor Bahru.
about.value1Desc: Clear reporting and honest communication at every step.
about.value2Desc: On-ground presence and responsive service you can count on.
about.value3Desc: Deep knowledge of local developments, regulations, and market trends.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation for your property
contact.formDescription: Tell us about your property and we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.propertyPlaceholder: e.g. Forest City, R&F Princess Cove
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your property and management needs...
contact.successMessage: We've received your inquiry and will contact you within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or WhatsApp us directly.

footer.tagline: Malaysia Property Management & Rental Solutions for Overseas Property Owners
